name: Grønland
short_description: Explore the frozen North, investigate your mysterious past, and try to remember... or forget. Grønland is a peculiar adventure game set in the lower Arctic of the late 19th century.
detailed_description:
It's 1899, and the frozen North is one of the Western world's last remaining frontiers.

Explorers come from across the globe, scheming and dreaming of planting their flag at the Pole. Every summer, a half dozen countries send massive expeditions, continuing a centuries-old search for the fabled Northwest Passage. Christian missionaries A RING OF BLUE IN AN ENDLESS BLACK have begun to settle and proselytize the faith, inflaming tensions with the dozens of local Inuit nations. It seems conflict is inevitable...

But why, exactly, are you here?

Well, that's up to you to remember... or forget.

Grønland is a peculiar, text-heavy adventure game set in a pint-sized open world HE WOULD HAVE FOLLOWED YOU TO THE END teeming with allies, adversaries, secrets, and treasures.

Kayak through frozen-over oceans, spelunk into dark caves, brave blizzards, scale volcanoes, hike over rocky taiga. The Arctic is an unforgiving place, but the truth is out there. With determination, and a little luck, you might be able to recollect your past THE LIGHT FOLLOWS one memory at a time.
